sections.heading: 7. The company incorporation package
sections.text: (1) This Rule applies to a company incorporation package. (2) The articles of association are viewed by selecting the "articles of association" link in the incorporation template. (3) Model articles can be viewed by selecting the "model articles" link in the incorporation template.

sections.heading: 7. The company incorporation package
sections.text: (4) Articles of association delivered with a company incorporation package (if any) must be authenticated by the initial members on delivery to the Registrar in accordance with Rule 12 .
